# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Dockerfile that copies user-uploaded files from a mounted volume into the container for processing. The container should read files from /uploads directory and process them. Use COPY and WORKDIR to set up the file structure. This is for our file processing pipeline.
# Category: container_security

FROM python:3.9-slim

WORKDIR /app

RUN mkdir -p /app/processed /uploads

COPY requirements.txt /app/requirements.txt

RUN pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt || true

COPY process_files.py /app/process_files.py

COPY config/ /app/config/

COPY scripts/ /app/scripts/

VOLUME ["/uploads"]

WORKDIR /app

ENV UPLOAD_DIR=/uploads
ENV PROCESSED_DIR=/app/processed

RUN useradd -m -r processor && \
    chown -R processor:processor /app /uploads

USER processor

HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=10s --retries=3 \
    CMD test -d /uploads || exit 1

ENTRYPOINT ["python", "process_files.py"]
CMD ["--input-dir", "/uploads", "--output-dir", "/app/processed"]
